title: [Login] Login with valid credentials
steps: Go to the login page;Enter a valid email;Enter the correct password;Click Login
expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard

title: [Login] Login with wrong password
steps: Go to the login page;Enter a valid email;Enter an incorrect password;Click Login
expected_result: An error message appears and the user stays on the login page

title: [Login] Login form blocks empty submission
steps: Click the Login button without filling in any fields
expected_result: Validation errors appear on both fields. The form does not submit

title: [Signup] Register with a new email
steps: Go to the signup page;Enter a valid unused email;Enter a password of 10 characters;Click Sign up
expected_result: Account is created and user is redirected to onboarding

title: [Signup] Register with an existing email
steps: Go to the signup page;Enter an email that already has an account;Enter any password;Click Sign up
expected_result: An error message states the email is already in use

title: [Profile] Update display name
steps: Log in;Go to Profile settings;Clear the display name field;Enter a new name;Click Save
expected_result: The new display name appears across the app

title: [Profile] Upload a valid avatar image
steps: Log in;Go to Profile settings;Click the avatar upload button;Choose a JPEG file under 2 MB;Click Save
expected_result: The new avatar is shown on the profile page

title: [Dashboard] Dashboard loads after login
steps: Log in with valid credentials;Wait for the page to fully load
expected_result: The dashboard displays metric cards and recent activity
preconditions: User has at least one previous session

title: [Checkout] Complete purchase with valid card
steps: Add an item to the cart;Go to checkout;Enter valid card details;Click Pay
expected_result: Order confirmation screen appears and a receipt email is sent
preconditions: User is logged in and cart has at least one item

title: [Checkout] Decline invalid card
steps: Add an item to the cart;Go to checkout;Enter an invalid card number;Click Pay
expected_result: A payment failure message is shown and the order is not placed
preconditions: User is logged in and cart has at least one item

title: [Login] This row has a bad status value
